ab: ya myan so mo i pey walam?
en: Are you available today?

ab: tangang?
en: What is the matter?

ab: ko naknakmen ko kangey jimo.
en: I would like to visit you.

ab: ko jingyan do vahey namen ta yamyan so vazey ko. no maikoan rana.
ch: W:我今天有事不在家。改天吧。
en: I am out today. How about another day?

ab: ka meywalam si marow, mangey ko jimo si makoyab.
ch: M:那你明天有空嗎?我下午去找你。
en: Then, are you available tomorrow? I’ll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

ab: noon, nanalahen ko imo do vahey namen.
en: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

ab: manngo! apyakapatoong ko sya? ta ko manakem a ya ciloon.
ch: M:請問我可以錄音嗎?我想做紀錄。
en: Would you mind if  I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

ab: apya! abokaratan na.
en: Sure! No problem.

ab: apya sivan ko?
en: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

ab: ko malahet a citahen. taosya.
ch: W:我不好看，倉庫也沒整理，不要啦。
en: No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn’t been tidied up yet.

ab: ka siva ko jya.
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: jimonivai.
en: No photographing either.

ab: ayoi mo kapya jyaken amapacici jimo.
en: Thank you for accepting the interview.

ab: apya, ikongo o mo ipanahes?
en: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

ab: no kalavayomo am, ikongo minavazey mo?
ch: M:請問您年輕時是做什麼的?
en: What do you do when you are young?

ab: minamey kalsong ko, am kona ni omhat.
ch: W:我以前是警察，但我現在退休了。
en: I was a police officer but I am retired now.

ab: ya mya so vazey mo siciaikoa ya?
en: Then, are you working at the moment?

ab: ko mya do peyvatvatkan ayameyvazey.
en: I am working at school.

ab: yamya o anakmo do ilinyo?
ch: M:請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎?
en: Do your kids live in the tribe too?

ab: beken, yamyan o anak ko do tose aya meyvahey.
ch: W:不，我的孩子在都市居住。
en: No, my kids are all living in the city.

ab: ka sa ka tao aya meyvahey?
en: Then, do you live by yourself?

ab: ya myan so ino ko kano lapik, yak mey anak ko.
ch: W:我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
en: I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

ab: ya myan so koza ko, ya myan so o mow malalam ya ko jya menengi.
ch: M:我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴不會無聊。
en: I have a cat too. I won’t get bored with the company of my pet.

ab: ko i panahes jimo. o makanyow do manakep so omowmalalam.
ch: M:我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌。
en: I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

ab: ya pereh ko katenngan, am ciaha ta tovisan ko imo.
ch: W:我知道的不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
en: I don’t know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

ab: a myan so makanyow do rayon?
ch: M:你們飛魚季有什麼禁忌嗎?
en: Do you have any taboos during the flying fish season?

ab: noon, a myan so makanyow. malotoy am jyangey do vahey no amyan so tatala.
ch: W:是，我們有飛魚季的禁忌。孕婦不能出去有小船的家屋。
en: Yes, we have a taboo during the flying fish season. Pregnant women are not allowed to go out to a house with a boat.

ab: tangang?
en: Why?

ab: ta ji makamong so arayo.
en: Because it will make us not able to catch the dolphinfish.
